prompt: I need to write an nf-test test file for a process called SAMTOOLS_INDEX. The process is defined in modules/samtools/index/main.nf, it takes a sorted BAM file as input (a tuple with meta map and bam file) and emits a tuple with meta and a .bai index file on a channel called 'bai', plus a versions.yml on a channel called 'versions'. Write a complete nf-test test file with at least two tests: one that verifies the process runs successfully and the output file has the right extension, and one that uses snapshot testing.

assertions.text: Uses nextflow_process block (not nextflow_workflow or nextflow_pipeline)
Has when { process { ... } } block with tuple input syntax
Includes at least one snapshot assertion (snapshot(...).match())
Uses ${projectDir} for test data paths (not hardcoded absolute paths)
